prompt: Research what YouTubers are saying about Claude Code and Obsidian — what are the best use cases people are finding?
assertions: Runs yt-search script with a query related to Claude Code and Obsidian
Shows the full YouTube search results to the user with metadata
Auto-selects videos without asking the user to pick
Explains which videos were selected and why
Adds selected YouTube URLs as sources
Runs notebooklm ask questions about key themes and takeaways
Presents a summary with a Key Takeaways section
Does NOT ask unnecessary confirmation questions mid-pipeline
